title: Better Servers
description: A 100% server side modpack that is on fabric  1.21.1 for the best performance and lets you play with your bedrock friend without making a bedrock server
body:
A 100% server side only modpack you can use on your minecraft server for better performance and with cool feature so you friends dont rage quit ;) without the dumb redstone breaking things papermc does and lets bedrock player join your java server.


(mods custom player heads and just mob heads kinda work with geyser; as far as i know glide away and toms mobs dont work because they use resorce packs; and vanilla refresh's item outline for when you die breaks and level up breaks on bedrock with your face full of particles)


The mods used are balm, vanilla refresh, lenient death, geyser, very many players, terralith, better than mending, c2me, floodgate, chunky, fabric language kotlin, tree harvester, krypton, bottle your xp, collective, custom player heads, when dungeons arise, expanded bow enchanting, expanded weapon enchating, get it together drops, just mob heads, let me despawn, lithostitched, nether portal fix, nullscape, rouge like dungeons, toms mob, polymer, transcending trident, fast minecart.



This still work if you use essential mod but you need to host the world yourself just geysesr and floodgate wont do anything.

Also you might have to convert the file to a .zip or transfer the mods to the mods folder if you add it to a server.
